verdict.note: YATU: real console New tab @5173. Splash renders the ANSI-Shadow SPEXCODE wordmark as pre/mono text with the theme blue→magenta gradient; verified re-inking across minimal, tokyonight, and light theme things; ask line beneath; rows grid-aligned.
Re-measured after retiring the ask caption: wordmark renders as before, no caption beneath, si-ask-gap spacer 21px keeps hero→input at 47px (pre-removal rhythm). Real console @5173.

Re-measure after this branch's launch.js conflict resolution (imports only — kept main's slimmed module + the apiUrl seam).
